thunderstorm.description: A storm-wracked world with relentless lightning, heavy rain, and violent weather.

drizzle.description: A swampy, mist-laden world with a damp atmosphere that matches steady light rain.

rain.description: A water planet that experiences frequent, heavy rainfall.

snow.description: The icy planet covered in ice and snow year-round, making it the perfect match for snowy conditions.

mist.description: A forest moon with cool, humid air and frequent mist through dense woodland.

smoke.description: A volcanic world of lava rivers and an ash-filled, smoky sky.

haze.description: A sunny, tropical beach planet known for its vibrant resorts and relaxing atmosphere.

fog.description: Known for cloud cover, with lower atmospheric layers that feel dense and foggy.

clear_scorching.description: An extremely hot volcanic world with blistering heat and fiery terrain.

clear_hot.description: The desert planet with twin suns is known for its scorching heat and clear skies.

clear_warm.description: A warm tropical world with clear skies and bright coastal weather.

clear_temperate.description: A balanced, temperate climate with clear skies and calm conditions.

clear_cool.description: A remote ocean world with clear air, cool temperatures, and windswept islands.

clear_chilly.description: A forested world that feels brisk and chilly beneath towering canopies.

clear_cold.description: The icy planet covered in ice and snow year-round, making it the perfect match for snowy conditions.

clear_freezing.description: A frigid, crystal-lined world with clear skies and severe cold.
